assertions.title: Cancelling the OS file picker leaves state unchanged
assertions.reason: Component-level coverage exists with an explicit picker-cancel test, and the targeted Vitest run passed for that case.

steps.expected: A test asserts empty file-list change does not trigger selection
steps.observed: Found test: 'picker-cancel does not call onSelect when the file input is cleared' asserting onSelect is not called and no validation error text appears

steps.action: Run targeted Vitest for the picker-cancel case
steps.observed: vitest run src/components/FileSelector.test.tsx -t picker-cancel does not call onSelect when the file input is cleared -> 1 passed, 7 skipped, exit code 0

evidence.testCase: picker-cancel does not call onSelect when the file input is cleared

assertions.title: Drag-leave resets drop-zone hover styling
assertions.reason: Component-level coverage exists with an explicit drag-leave hover reset test, and the targeted Vitest run passed for that case.

steps.expected: A test asserts hover classes are applied on drag enter/over and removed on drag leave without triggering selection
steps.observed: Found test: 'drag-leave-resets-hover styling without calling onSelect' asserting hover classes toggle correctly and onSelect is not called

steps.action: Run targeted Vitest for the drag-leave case
steps.observed: vitest run src/components/FileSelector.test.tsx -t drag-leave-resets-hover styling without calling onSelect -> 1 passed, 7 skipped, exit code 0

summary: Tested 2 assertions (VAL-FILE-018, VAL-FILE-019): 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
